statement: In every magma, Equation 1589 (`x = (y * z) * (z * (x * w))`) implies Equation 1532 (`x = (y * y) * (y * (z * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0706
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op z (op x w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y y) (op y (op z y)))
